analysis.object: T524: Yang-Mills Instanton Vacuum v2 depth analysis

topological_charge.description: Topological charge Q is EML-0 (discrete integer, Pontryagin index)
topological_charge.reason: Q in Z is the canonical EML-0 topological quantum number

theta_vacuum.description: Theta-vacuum = Fourier sum over Q-sectors; EML-3 oscillatory superposition
theta_vacuum.reason: exp(i*theta*Q) sum over EML-0 sectors creates EML-3 oscillation

strong_cp.description: Strong CP: theta~0 is EML-2 fine-tuning; axion is EML-3 oscillatory solution
strong_cp.reason: Peccei-Quinn axion is EML-3 remedy for EML-2 fine-tuning
